summary: Testing completed for 'tipo' field using x_tipo_resumen values. All backend APIs (100%) return correct tipo values like 'Pantalon Denim', 'Polo', 'Camisa'. Frontend pages correctly display Tipo column. The sync_engine.py correctly uses x_tipo_resumen from product.tipo model.
passed_tests: GET /api/pos-lines-full - returns tipo field with x_tipo_resumen values (e.g., 'Pantalon Denim', 'Polo', 'Camisa', 'Bermuda')
GET /api/pos-lines-full?tipo=Pant - filter by tipo works correctly with ILIKE
GET /api/stock-by-product - returns tipo, product_name, marca fields in response schema
GET /api/stock-by-location - returns tipo, product_name, marca, location_name fields
POS Lines page (/pos-lines) - Tipo column visible with correct values
Stock x Producto page (/stock-by-product) - Producto, Tipo, Marca columns visible
Stock x Tienda page (/stock-by-location) - Producto, Tipo, Marca, Tienda columns visible
product_template table has 2,041 records with tipo field containing x_tipo_resumen values
critical_code_review_comments: The x_tipo_resumen lookup in sync_engine.py (lines 505-536) is correctly implemented - fetches tipo IDs, looks up x_tipo_resumen from product.tipo model, falls back to name if x_tipo_resumen is empty
SQL views v_stock_by_product and v_stock_by_product_location correctly JOIN with product_template to get tipo/marca fields
Note: Many stock_quant records show NULL for producto/tipo/marca because their product_ids don't match synced products (sync filter: sale_ok=True, purchase_ok=False, active=True)
context_for_next_testing_agent: The tipo field is working correctly with x_tipo_resumen values. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_tipo_field.py. Stock views show NULL for product data when product_id doesn't exist in product_product (due to sync filter), this is expected behavior.

test_observations.stock_by_product: Shows tipo when product exists, NULL otherwise (expected due to sync filter)
test_observations.stock_by_location: Same as stock_by_product - tipo shows when product exists
test_observations.data_note: product_template has 2,041 records, product_product has 32,743 records. stock_quant has 1M+ records but many reference products not in synced set
